spec.deliveryRule: Codex comments are engagement or findings evidence. Implementation delivery requires a verifiable GitHub PR, branch, commit, or merge.
spec.operatingDecision: Use Codex primarily for review, investigation, and adversarial validation. Use Copilot or coordinator materialization for implementation when Codex cannot create a verifiable GitHub artifact.
knownLeakage: Codex implementation comments may claim local commits or make_pr payloads that do not materialize as GitHub PRs.
Routine Copilot assignment can assign the human owner unless assignee cleanup is performed.
controlActions: Use @codex review for PR review tasks.
Verify every Codex implementation claim with PR, branch, commit, or merge search.
Treat unverified Codex implementation comments as codex_unverified_output.
Route materialization fallback to Copilot or coordinator branch when Codex cannot push.
